title: Are you afraid?
description: In the year 1991 a team of explorers discovered a mega island called nova-pangaea and began to add resources to their pockets with miners and more explorers, however people began to disappear over theres a unknow explain.
body: In the year 1991 a team of explorers discovered a mega island called nova-pangaea and began to add resources to their pockets with miners and more explorers, however people began to disappear over the months the miners are scared and afraid to get more resources but the lords above do not care about their integrity, you are one of those miners that luckily the beasts have not devoured you but your days are counted.
